title: Add multiple agenda items based on 1 Monday item

posts.author: patrickadam (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I am trying to add multiple agenda items based on 1 Monday item. I want to add a ‘pickup date’ and a ‘return date’. These should be 2 separate agenda items without being linked.

The only thing that is strange is that sometimes the ‘pickup date’ is shown and sometimes the ‘return date’. How is this possible and can it do what I want?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you share the automations you have set up?

posts.author: patrickadam (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use the default automation with Google Calendar (‘When an item is created or updated, create an event in Google, and sync future changes from this board.’).

I add two automations. One for the pickup date and one for the return date.
